proposition: In January 2026, a court exekutor ordered execution against Tomáš Melichárek's personal ownership stake (podíl) in Able.cz s.r.o., to satisfy a 9,327.14 CZK debt owed to Dopravní podnik hl. m. Prahy, a.s. (the Prague public-transport operator). The execution was closed on 24 March 2026 as satisfied by payment ('skončena vymožením'). This is a personal, minor matter — consistent with an unpaid public-transport fine escalated to court enforcement — not a sign of company-level financial distress; no insolvency or company-directed enforcement was found.
shortTitle: In January 2026, a court exekutor ordered execution against Tomáš…
statusExplanation: Přímo doloženo primárním/oficiálním zdrojem (např. přímý výpis rejstříku nebo zakládaná listina).
note: The debtor's birth-ID number, present in the source documents, was redacted from this dossier and its underlying case files per personal-data-minimization practice.

sources.title: Sbírka listin (or.justice.cz) — exekuční příkaz postižením obchodního podílu, T. Melichárek (C 85425/SL69/KSBR)
Sbírka listin (or.justice.cz) — oznámení o skončení exekuce, T. Melichárek (C 85425/SL70/KSBR)

supersededReason: Embedded an unsourced cause ('consistent with an unpaid public-transport fine') and a materiality judgment inside a primary-verified observation; the filed documents state creditor and amount, never the debt's origin. Also, the insolvency-register part could never be asserted: ISIR was BLOCKED (HTTP 500), not searched. Split 2026-07-18.
